h1.visual_description: Centered, serif font, light gray or muted color, title case. Functions as a running document title.
h1.example_text: Restrictions on Land Ownership by Foreigners in Selected Jurisdictions

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page, but inferred as bolded inline emphasis for specific entities within paragraphs.

visual_matchers.pattern: Superscript Arabic numerals following punctuation or words.
Small, serif text at the bottom of the page separated by a horizontal rule.
Bolded proper nouns within standard paragraph text.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Bluebook-style legal citations in footnotes (e.g., Id. art. XX; Author, Title, Publisher, Date, URL).

margin_noise_patterns.header: Centered document title in light gray text at the top margin.
margin_noise_patterns.footer: Left-aligned 'The Law Library of Congress' and right-aligned Arabic page number at the bottom margin.
